generated_oml:

    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor providing raw point cloud data for object detection"

]

]

]

]

]

]

]

]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

]

]

]

]

]

]

instance AutonomousVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [

    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, CrossSystemEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends motor voltage commands and steering‑servo setpoints generated by the Controlling FE (ACC) and Actuation FE, as well as remote‑management commands (enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency brake) issued through the User Interface FE."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Sub‑second real‑time operation with a hard end‑to‑end latency limit of 100 ms between PT and DT; component clocks are synchronized to within 100 ms accuracy."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The PT runs the Physical Twin Entity on its Jetson hardware, exposing sensor data over ROS 2; the Digital Twin Entity runs on separate compute (e.g., cloud/PC) and receives data via Wi‑Fi, performs ACC, reporting, and visualization preprocessing; the User Entity provides a 3D visualization and control panel UI; all entities inter‑communicate through ROS 2 topics and a Cross‑System Data Translation FE that serializes and converts units."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "High‑fidelity sensor processing (DBSCAN, Kalman filter) ensures accurate object tracks; ACC follows ISO 15622 specifications; latency ≤100 ms and clock sync ≤100 ms guarantee timely and ordered data for safety‑critical operation; external SQL storage keeps a complete timeseries for validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Bi‑directional Wi‑Fi link between PT and DT; ROS 2 publish/subscribe transports intra‑entity messages; Data Translation FE serializes data, aligns message types and performs unit conversions; optional OPC‑UA transport is mentioned as a possible implementation."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity components execute on the vehicle’s Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity components (data collection, ACC, reporting, visualization preprocessing) run on an external computing platform (e.g., cloud or workstation) accessed via Wi‑Fi; each FE is packaged as an independent ROS 2 node for modular deployment."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 (reference architecture and functional entities), uses ISO 15622 for ACC functional specifications, references IEC 62541 OPC‑UA as a possible communication standard, and adopts 3GPP 22.185 latency requirements; ROS 2 and NVIDIA JetPack provide de‑facto industrial tooling standards."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The system is designed for safety‑critical operation with strict latency (≤100 ms) and clock‑sync (≤100 ms) constraints; remote management includes an emergency braking command; although explicit security mechanisms are not described, the architecture assumes safe operation of remote commands on a physical twin."
]
